summary: Tested NOVACNKT auth/onboarding/payments updates. Backend 10/10 pytest pass: industries=8 (each has tagline+image+http URL), discounts=5 (with code/title/description/note/accent), plans, services, blogs, testimonials, profile, portfolio, payments POST(404 for invalid plan, success for valid), payments GET listing. Frontend 8/9 flows pass: Splash→/welcome redirect (no auth), Welcome title 'Delightful Business Start Here' + Get Started bottom sheet with 4 buttons, Continue with Email→/signup?method=email→/onboarding, Onboarding 3-step gating (interests required, name required, final navigates /home with onboarded=true), Home renders 8 industry pills with name+tagline overlays, Home does NOT render Payments before payment, Plans Pay Now records payment to localStorage with tier='Standard' and status='succeeded', /login mock submits and lands on /home, Splash with auth+onboarded stays. CRITICAL FAIL: After a payment, /home still does NOT render <PaymentsSection /> because Home.jsx imports the component but never actually mounts it in JSX.

ui_bugs.issue: PaymentsSection is imported (line 6) but is NEVER rendered in the JSX tree. As a result, after a successful Plans Pay Now (recordPayment writes payments[] to localStorage 'nova_auth_v1'), navigating to /home still does not show the white 'Upcoming actions' / 'Payments' card. The user requirement '/home shows Payments section after a payment' is not met.

integration_issues.issue: AuthContext.recordPayment correctly persists payment to localStorage user.payments[0] with {id, plan_id, amount=149, status='succeeded', tier='Standard', ts}. PaymentsSection component logic itself is correct (returns null when payments.length===0 and renders white card otherwise). The break is purely that Home.jsx never invokes <PaymentsSection /> in its rendered output.

action_items: In /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx, mount <PaymentsSection /> inside the scrollable section (per spec, at top of the scroll body just above DiscountsCarousel or just under home-hero). Suggested: add `<PaymentsSection />` as the first child of the `<div className='overflow-y-auto scrollbar-hide flex-1 -mx-5 px-5 mt-2'>` wrapper, before <DiscountsCarousel/>. Component already self-gates via `if (!payments.length) return null;` so it won't show until a payment exists.

(Optional) Update test report context for next agent: industry icons param `icon` from API is currently unused in the new pill UI (no icon shown on the card). Not a bug — just dead data in the new design.

(Optional) Welcome page: title h1 renders as 'Delightful BusinessStart Here' when text-content is queried (the
is collapsed in textContent). Visual is fine; only mention in case of strict text-equality assertions.
critical_code_review_comments: Home.jsx imports PaymentsSection but never mounts it — dead import + missing required UI section (HIGH).
AuthContext.jsx: persistence and recordPayment are correctly implemented; localStorage key 'nova_auth_v1' matches spec.

Onboarding.jsx: validation logic on each step is correct; final 'Allow & finish' calls completeOnboarding (sets onboarded=true) and navigates /home; 'Maybe later' calls updateUser({notifications:false, onboarded:true}) and navigates /home — both flows correct.

Plans.jsx: recordPayment receives spread of API response + tier — good; outer card already converted to div role='button' (no nested <button> hydration warning anymore — earlier iteration_1 issue is FIXED).
Backend server.py: SEED_INDUSTRIES has 8 items each with tagline+image; SEED_DISCOUNTS has 5; POST /api/payments persists to MongoDB and excludes _id on read — clean.
test_credentials: N/A — auth fully mocked via localStorage key 'nova_auth_v1'
seed_data_creation: Created 2 test payment rows in MongoDB collection 'payments' across iterations via POST /api/payments (no user_email & TEST_buyer@example.com).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest 10/10 at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py. Frontend public URL via REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL=https://whiteboard-design.preview.emergentagent.com. Auth is localStorage key 'nova_auth_v1'; clear it between flows. Welcome (/welcome) has data-testids welcome-screen, welcome-get-started, get-started-sheet, continue-{phone,email,apple,google}, open-login. Auth pages: signup-email/password/submit and login-email/password/submit. Onboarding: step-interests, interest-{name-lower}, step-profile, onboarding-name/business, step-notifications, onboarding-next, skip-notifications. Home: 8 industry pills under [data-testid^='industry-i']. PaymentsSection only mounts when user.payments.length>0 — but is currently NOT mounted in Home.jsx at all. Once main agent renders <PaymentsSection/> in Home, retest by: signup→onboarding→/plans Pay Now→/home and check [data-testid='payments-section'] visible and [data-testid='payment-0'] (within7d) shows tier+amount+status badge.
rca of the issue: RCA: /app/frontend/src/pages/Home.jsx line 6 imports `import PaymentsSection from '../components/PaymentsSection';` but no <PaymentsSection /> tag exists anywhere in the returned JSX (verified via grep -n 'PaymentsSection' Home.jsx → only the import line is matched). Reproduction: 1) clear localStorage; 2) goto /welcome → Get Started → Continue with Email → signup; 3) onboarding 3 steps → /home; 4) goto /plans → Pay Now (toast 'payment succeeded · $149'); 5) localStorage.nova_auth_v1.payments[0] is correctly populated with {tier:'Standard', status:'succeeded', amount:149, ts:...}; 6) goto /home → [data-testid='payments-section'] is absent. Mitigation: in Home.jsx render `<PaymentsSection />` inside the scroll container (before <DiscountsCarousel/>) — the component already self-gates via `if (!payments.length) return null;` so no extra conditional needed in Home.
